exclusion_rule: Tracked files excluding telemetry, .git, node_modules, dist, and build path roots.
includes: code, docs, scripts, schemas, configs, and data files
command_used: git ls-files | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '(^|/)(telemetry|\.git|node_modules|dist|build)/' } | ForEach-Object { if (Test-Path $_) { Get-Content $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Line } } | Measure-Object -Property Lines -Sum
measurement_note: Current measured value from this run was 3484 files and 228946 lines.
